name: account.carddav
title: Account:CardDAV
description: The declaration to configure a Contacts account.

payload.content: A CardDAV configuration defines a CardDAV contacts account for a user.

payloadkeys.title: Account Name
payloadkeys.content: The name that apps show to the user for this address book account. If not present, the system generates a suitable default.

payloadkeys.title: Server Host Name
payloadkeys.content: The hostname or IP address of the CardDAV server.

payloadkeys.title: Server Port
payloadkeys.content: The port number for the CardDAV server.

payloadkeys.title: Server Path
payloadkeys.content: The path for the CardDAV server.

payloadkeys.title: Authentication Credentials Asset Reference
payloadkeys.content: The identifier of an asset declaration that contains the credentials for this account. Set the corresponding asset type to `CredentialUserNameAndPassword`.
